generated_pair.question: What is the base class for all built-in exceptions in Python?

generated_pair.question: Which exception class is recommended for user-defined exceptions to inherit from, and why?
generated_pair.answer: Exception (or one of its subclasses), because it is not recommended to derive new exceptions from BaseException.
supporting_sentences: programmers are encouraged to derive new exceptions from the Exception class or one of its subclasses, and not from BaseException.
